text.text:
*Current Issue*
Users may be intermittently unable to access Exchange Online mailboxes through some connection methods. Microsoft 365 status mirrors still show this as an active service degradation.

fields.text:
*Impact*
Email access disruption for some tenants and support volume risk for MSP help desks; may affect Outlook/OWA connectivity depending on connection path.

text.text:
*Response*
• Check affected tenants for mailbox access failures and validate alternate access paths before escalating user-impact tickets.
• Pause broad client troubleshooting changes; monitor Microsoft 365 admin/service health updates and capture tenant-specific error examples.
